name: Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions and celery until onions are translucent.
2. In a mixing bowl, mix ground beef, sauteed onions and celery, and 1/2 of the bread crumbs. Add bread crumbs until the mixture is firm but not hard.
3. Take care not to overmix.
4. Transfer the mixture into well-oiled loaf pans.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 to 1.5 hours.
6. Check for doneness.
7. Allow to cool, slice into .25 inch slices.
8. Reheat 30 minutes prior to serving.
9. Garnish with chopped parsley and onion crown.
